prompt:
A time-stamped thrust-curve capture from a secured static model rocket engine burn, shown as a printed thrust log sheet beside a restrained test stand, a small spent model rocket motor, load-cell hardware, and soot-marked but orderly test equipment. The page should clearly communicate a completed static engine test used for go and no-go interpretation, with curve plotting and timing blocks implied by shapes and layout rather than readable text.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future rocketry workshop aesthetic: soft task lighting, realistic paper, metal, wiring, and scorched test-rig textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the thrust log centered and the secured test hardware visible but clean and controlled in the background.
